news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.

news.title:
ICICI Bank completes transfer of investment management rights to a new company.
The transfer impacts multiple AIFs and is effective from April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank completes transfer of investment management rights to a new company.
The transfer impacts multiple AIFs and is effective from April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's Sneha Poddar recommends 5 stocks, including ICICI Bank and Max Financial, with up to 48% upside potential.
Stock picks include Tata Power, Aurobindo Pharma, and IPCA Labs, backed by strong growth, profitability, and operational improvements.

news.title:
ICICI Bank uncovered a Rs 23 crore gold loan scam involving fake gold deposits across nine Nagpur branches.
The scam was detected during an internal audit; Dhantoli police have initiated a fraud investigation.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank uncovered a Rs 23 crore gold loan scam involving fake gold deposits across nine Nagpur branches.
The scam was detected during an internal audit; Dhantoli police have initiated a fraud investigation.

news.title:
ICICI Bank saw an NSE block trade of 1,363,840 shares worth Rs. 166.7 cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,222.1 per share.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank saw an NSE block trade of 1,363,840 shares worth Rs. 166.7 cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,222.1 per share.

news.title:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.
news.summary:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.

news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.

news.title:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on ICICI Bank, target price Rs 1,720 with 36.7% upside.
ROA expected >2.3%, ~5% QoQ loan and >6% QoQ deposit growth via retail mobilisation.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on ICICI Bank, target price Rs 1,720 with 36.7% upside.
ROA expected >2.3%, ~5% QoQ loan and >6% QoQ deposit growth via retail mobilisation.

news.title:
ICICI Bank CEO Sandeep Bakhshi credits India's growth to human capital and digital progress.
Bakhshi received XLRI's Sir Jehangir Ghandy Medal for his industry and social contributions.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank CEO Sandeep Bakhshi credits India's growth to human capital and digital progress.
Bakhshi received XLRI's Sir Jehangir Ghandy Medal for his industry and social contributions.

news.title:
ICICI Bank may see USD 133m outflows due to Nifty semi-annual rejig.
The rejig is scheduled for 3 PM today, impacting foreign investments.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank may see USD 133m outflows due to Nifty semi-annual rejig.
The rejig is scheduled for 3 PM today, impacting foreign investments.

news.title:
HSBC India notes a 20% crude rise cuts earnings by 1.5%, impacting Hindalco, Adani Ports, Godrej Consumer.
Defensive picks: Sun Pharma, RIL, Bharti Airtel, NTPC; structural winners: Apollo Hospitals, ICICI Bank, SBI Life.
news.summary:
HSBC India notes a 20% crude rise cuts earnings by 1.5%, impacting Hindalco, Adani Ports, Godrej Consumer.
Defensive picks: Sun Pharma, RIL, Bharti Airtel, NTPC; structural winners: Apollo Hospitals, ICICI Bank, SBI Life.

news.title:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.
news.summary:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.

news.title:
ICICI Bank revises India's FY27 growth forecast to 6.9% from 7.2% due to energy disruptions.
Industrial sectors face production cuts; Q4FY26, Q1FY27 likely impacted by supply constraints and trade issues.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank revises India's FY27 growth forecast to 6.9% from 7.2% due to energy disruptions.
Industrial sectors face production cuts; Q4FY26, Q1FY27 likely impacted by supply constraints and trade issues.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.

news.title:
ICICI Bank report projects CPI inflation at 4.5% in FY27 due to rising energy costs, up from 3.9%.
Higher energy weight in CPI increases sensitivity to oil price hikes, with $10/bbl rise impacting CPI by 40-45bps.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank report projects CPI inflation at 4.5% in FY27 due to rising energy costs, up from 3.9%.
Higher energy weight in CPI increases sensitivity to oil price hikes, with $10/bbl rise impacting CPI by 40-45bps.

news.title:
ICICI Bank consolidated ICICI Strategic Investments Fund's financials.
All residual units to be redeemed by March 25, 2026; fund exits group entity status.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank consolidated ICICI Strategic Investments Fund's financials.
All residual units to be redeemed by March 25, 2026; fund exits group entity status.

news.title:
ICICI Bank sees a 16.0% surge in open interest, indicating active market positioning.
Despite nearing its 52-week low, price and volume trends show cautious optimism among traders.
news.summary:
ICICI Bank sees a 16.0% surge in open interest, indicating active market positioning.
Despite nearing its 52-week low, price and volume trends show cautious optimism among traders.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
news.summary:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
